query:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS registros_a_manter AS
SELECT MIN(i.id) as id_manter
FROM interacoes i
WHERE DATE(i.createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY i.leadId, i.corretorId, i.tipo, DATE(i.createdAt)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
